title: T-Deck gateway: WiFi station backhaul support
description: Add WiFi client mode configuration, connection management, and net_if integration for T-Deck ESP32-S3 in lichen/apps/gateway. Support static or DHCPv6 for upstream connectivity. Update board Kconfig and prj.conf for T-Deck gateway build. Include WiFi credential provisioning via LCI/CoAP.
notes: Escalating: T-Deck gateway WiFi station backhaul support needs human judgment on configuration, net_if, LCI credential provisioning per do-beads rule
close_reason: Escalated large protocol/design to human; fixed Kconfig stack=8192 in t_deck_esp32s3_procpu_defconfig for ESP32-S3 NET configs (minimal edit, west+rust verified, 3 codereview passes complete)
